Class JavaMethodToolCall

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.event.BasicPropertyChangeSource
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.AbstractPart
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.AbstractToolCall<JavaMethodTool, JavaMethodToolResponse>
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.spi.java.JavaMethodToolCall
All Implemented Interfaces:
PropertyChangeSource, ThoughtSignature, Rebindable
public class JavaMethodToolCall extends AbstractToolCall<JavaMethodTool, JavaMethodToolResponse>
A model-agnostic representation of a request to execute a specific Java method tool.
Author:
anahata-gemini-pro-2.5

    Methods inherited from class AbstractToolCall

    calculateTokenCount, getDefaultMaxDepth, getEffectiveArgs, getMessage, getPrunedHint, getToolName, resetTokenCount, setModifiedArgument
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    calculateTokenCount()
    Performs the lazy, model-specific token calculation for this part.
    protected int
    getDefaultMaxDepth()
    Template method hook for subclasses to provide their specific default max depth policy.
    Map<String,Object>
    getEffectiveArgs()
    Gets the effective arguments for the UI (original + draft modifications).
    AbstractModelMessage
    getMessage()
    Gets the model message that initiated this tool call.
    String
    getPrunedHint()
    Returns a summarized string representation of the part's content to be used as a "Hint" when the part is effectively pruned.
    String
    getToolName()
    Gets the name of the tool to be invoked.
    void
    resetTokenCount()
    Resets the cached token count, forcing a lazy, background recalculation on the next call to getTokenCount().
    void
    setModifiedArgument(String name, Object value)
    Updates a modified argument in the draft state and fires a property change event.

    Methods inherited from class AbstractPart

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    appendMetadata(StringBuilder sb)
    Hook for subclasses to inject specialized metadata into the part header.
    String
    createMetadataHeader()
    Creates a standardized text header containing metadata for this part.
    Agi
    getAgi()
    Gets the parent agi session.
    AgiConfig
    getAgiConfig()
    Gets the agi configuration.
    final int
    getEffectiveMaxDepth()
    The definitive method for resolving the max depth policy for this part.
    int
    getEffectiveTokenCount()
    Calculates the total "effective" tokens contributed by this part.
    protected String
    getIdentityLabel()
    Returns the identity label for the metadata header (e.g., "Part ID: 45").
    int
    getMetadataTokenCount()
    Calculates the token count of the metadata header for this part.
    int
    getRemainingDepth()
    Calculates the remaining depth before this part is auto-pruned.
    int
    getTokenCount()
    Retrieves the cached token count for this part.
    boolean
    isAuto()
    Checks if this part is managed automatically.
    boolean
    isEffectivelyPruned()
    Calculates the EFFECTIVE pruned state of this part.
    boolean
    isPinned()
    Checks if this part is explicitly pinned.
    boolean
    isPruned()
    Checks if this part is explicitly pruned.
    void
    remove()
    Removes this part from its parent message and severs the bidirectional link.
    void
    setExpanded(boolean expanded)
    Sets the expanded state and fires a property change event.
    void
    setPruningState(PruningState pruningState)
    Sets the pruning state of this part and fires a property change event.
    void
    setPruningState(PruningState pruningState, String reason)
    Sets the pruning state of this part with an optional reason.
    void
    setTokenCount(int tokenCount)
    Sets the token count and fires a property change event.

  • Constructor Details

    • JavaMethodToolCall

      public JavaMethodToolCall(AbstractModelMessage modelMessage, String id, @NonNull @NonNull JavaMethodTool tool, @NonNull @NonNull Map<String,Object> rawArgs, @NonNull @NonNull Map<String,Object> args)
      Constructs a new JavaMethodToolCall instance.
      Parameters:
      modelMessage - The model message initiating this call.
      id - The unique identifier of this call.
      tool - The target JavaMethodTool instance.
      rawArgs - The raw, untyped JSON arguments passed by the model.
      args - The converted, type-safe Java arguments.

  • Method Details

    • createResponse

      protected JavaMethodToolResponse createResponse()
      Description copied from class: AbstractToolCall
      Creates the corresponding response object for this tool call. This acts as a factory method and is called once by the constructor.
      Specified by:
      createResponse in class AbstractToolCall<JavaMethodTool, JavaMethodToolResponse>
      Returns:
      A new, un-executed tool response.

    • asText

      public String asText()
      Returns the content of the part as a simple string. This is implemented by subclasses. Returns a Java-like method signature: toolName(arg1, arg2, null, arg4).
      Overrides:
      asText in class AbstractToolCall<JavaMethodTool, JavaMethodToolResponse>
      Returns:
      The text representation of the part.
